title: Pan-Seared Cod with Turkish Spices
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Chinese-inspired dish featuring pan-seared cod with a blend of Turkish spices.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Season the cod fillets with black pepper, nutmeg, and Turkish spice blend.
3. Add oil to the preheated skillet and swirl it around.
4. Add the cod fillets, skin side up (if they have skin).
5. Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the skin is golden brown.
6. Flip the cod fillets and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until cooked through.
7. Remove the cod from the skillet and set aside.
8. In the same skillet, add the mixed stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender.
9. Serve the pan-seared cod with the stir-fry vegetables on top.
10. Garnish with additional Turkish spice blend, if desired.
